free_text: Preparation of carrier-free radioactive thallium
for medical use
CEA Department of Biology, Service
Hospitalier Frederic Joliot
No information on the uncertainty
Table 1 of Radiochem.Radioanal.Lett.23(1975)131
SD
VS. Major revisions in all data subentries.
On. HISTORY(20160518A) updated.
15 MeV deuterons Cyclotron or
15 MeV deuterons Van de Graaf tandem
The irradiated substances consisted of red mercury
oxide containing less than 1 ppm iron, and
high-purity (99.999%) metallic mercury. The red oxide
was deposited on a scored aluminium plate (grooves
1mm wide, 1 mm deep and 0.5 mm apart). About 2 g of
powder are packed onto a surface of 40 cm2 then
covered with a 10 u-m thick aluminium film.
VS. SF8: DT->EOB.

14,16 and 20MeV protons compact Cyclotr
variable-energy cyclotron
The mercury metal is placed in a titanium cell of
a depth of 3 mm and area of 20cm2, a 20 u-m titanium
film and a 0.1 mm aliminium film covering the face
directed towards the charged particle beam. The purpose
of the latter film is to stiffen the former.
VS. SF8: DT->EOB.
